item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Dragoon's Journey II
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned dragoon─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level dragoon to 70 and complete all job quests up through “Dragon Sound.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
